_doc: Known-activist CIK registry — read by agents/news/activist_registry.py.
13D classifier matches EDGAR filer CIKs against this list.  Filings
from filers NOT in this list are skipped — that's the design.
Each entry below is a best-effort seed with the CIK from public
filings memory. Failure mode is SILENT MISS (failsafe direction):
a wrong CIK means we miss filings from that activist, never a
false positive on someone else.  Spot-check each CIK at
and update the per-entry 'notes' field to 'Verified YYYY-MM-DD'
1 — Top-tier, proven track record, large positions, market-moving
Adding a CIK to this file is a deployment-relevant change.  Treat
it like any other config — commit, push, news_agent reads it on

activists.name: Pershing Square Capital Management, L.P.
activists.notes: Verified — used as docstring example in activist_registry.py. Concentrated long activist; ~10-position book; large public campaigns.

activists.name: Icahn Capital LP
activists.notes: PENDING_OPERATOR_VERIFICATION — Carl Icahn's primary filing entity. Spot-check at edgar.sec.gov. Long-running activist, multi-decade track record.

activists.name: ValueAct Capital Management, L.P.
activists.notes: PENDING_OPERATOR_VERIFICATION — constructive activist, prefers board-level engagement. Spot-check at edgar.sec.gov.

activists.name: Starboard Value LP
activists.notes: PENDING_OPERATOR_VERIFICATION — operational activist, frequent board-slate proxy fights. Spot-check at edgar.sec.gov.

activists.name: Third Point LLC
activists.notes: PENDING_OPERATOR_VERIFICATION — event-driven, M&A-focused activist. Famous open letters. Spot-check at edgar.sec.gov.

activists.name: Trian Fund Management, L.P.
activists.notes: PENDING_OPERATOR_VERIFICATION — consumer / industrial activist. Spot-check at edgar.sec.gov.

activists.name: JANA Partners LLC
activists.notes: PENDING_OPERATOR_VERIFICATION — event-driven activist, frequent breakup advocate. Spot-check at edgar.sec.gov.

activists.name: Elliott Investment Management L.P.
activists.notes: PENDING_OPERATOR_VERIFICATION — current Elliott filing entity (post-2020 reorg from Elliott Management Corp). Tech / mid-cap activist. Spot-check at edgar.sec.gov.

activists.name: Engine Capital LP
activists.notes: PENDING_OPERATOR_VERIFICATION — small/mid-cap activist. Spot-check at edgar.sec.gov.

activists.name: Engaged Capital, LLC
activists.notes: PENDING_OPERATOR_VERIFICATION — small-cap constructive activist. Spot-check at edgar.sec.gov.

activists.name: Cevian Capital Partners
activists.notes: PENDING_OPERATOR_VERIFICATION — European long-term activist; large stakes in industrials. Spot-check at edgar.sec.gov.

activists.name: Land & Buildings Investment Management LLC
activists.notes: PENDING_OPERATOR_VERIFICATION — REIT-focused activist. Spot-check at edgar.sec.gov.
